name: Generic OIDC
description: Connect any OIDC-compatible identity provider — Authentik, Ory, Okta, Auth0, Azure AD, and more.
longDescription:
## Generic OIDC Identity Provider

Connect Kleff to any identity provider that supports OpenID Connect.

### Compatible providers
- **Authentik** — set issuer to your application's OIDC provider URL
- **Ory Hydra / Kratos** — set issuer to your Hydra issuer URL
- **Okta** — set issuer to `https://your-org.okta.com/oauth2/default`
- **Auth0** — set issuer to `https://your-tenant.auth0.com/`
- **Azure AD** — set issuer to `https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant}/v2.0`
- **Google** — set issuer to `https://accounts.google.com`
- Any other OIDC-compliant provider

### Login modes
- **redirect** *(recommended)* — users are sent to your IDP's login page. Works with every provider.
- **headless** — Kleff shows its own login form and forwards credentials via Resource Owner Password Credentials (ROPC). Only enable if your provider supports the ROPC grant.

### User registration
This plugin does not create users — manage accounts through your identity provider's admin interface.

### Setup
1. Create an OIDC application / client in your identity provider.
2. Set the redirect URI to `https://your-kleff-domain/auth/callback`.
3. Copy the issuer URL, client ID, and client secret below.
author: Kleff

config.label: Issuer URL
config.description: Your identity provider's OIDC issuer URL. The plugin fetches configuration from {issuer}/.well-known/openid-configuration.

config.label: Client ID
config.description: The client ID of your OIDC application.

config.label: Client Secret
config.description: The client secret. Leave blank for public clients.

config.label: Login Mode
config.description: redirect — users log in via your IDP's own login page (recommended). headless — Kleff shows its own form and forwards credentials via ROPC (only enable if your IDP supports it).

name: Keycloak
description: Red Hat Keycloak identity provider. SSO, MFA, and self-hosted user management.
longDescription:
## Keycloak Identity Provider

Connect Kleff to your Keycloak realm for enterprise-grade identity management.

### Features
- Direct Access Grant (headless login)
- User registration via Keycloak Admin REST API
- RS256 JWT verification via JWKS endpoint
- Multi-realm support

### Setup
1. Create a Keycloak realm for Kleff (e.g. `kleff`).
2. Create a confidential client with **Direct access grants** enabled.
3. Create an admin service account or use the master realm admin credentials.
4. Fill in the config fields below and click Install.
author: Kleff

config.label: Keycloak URL
config.description: Leave blank to use the bundled Keycloak. Set this to connect to your own existing Keycloak server instead.

config.label: Realm
config.description: Realm name on your Keycloak server. Only needed when connecting to an external Keycloak.

config.label: Admin Password
config.description: Admin password for your Keycloak server. Only needed when connecting to an external Keycloak.
